---
title: "Core_drought_metabolome"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
## ---- 0 - setup ----

library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

setwd("~/Documents/Tsoumalis_Git/")  # update this to your code_data folder path

dir.create("./core_drought_metabolome", recursive = TRUE)


```

```{r}
## 1. Loading the limma data
## ---- 1 - load limma results ----

pos <- read.xlsx(
  "~/Downloads/OneDrive_1_06-05-2026/Analysis_chrats_2026/metabolomics_limma_perspp_all_spp.xlsx",
  sheet = "positive_per_species"
)

neg <- read.xlsx(
  "~/Downloads/OneDrive_1_06-05-2026/Analysis_chrats_2026/metabolomics_limma_perspp_all_spp.xlsx",
  sheet = "negative_per_species"
)

pos$ionization_mode <- "positive"
neg$ionization_mode <- "negative"

cat("Positive mode features:", nrow(pos), "\n")
cat("Negative mode features:", nrow(neg), "\n")
```
